title: Amauropelta funckii
taxonomy: Amauropelta funckii is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is a type of deciduous fern native to South America. It belongs to the genus Amauropelta and is further classified within the kingdom Plantae. Amauropelta funckii is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and fragmentation.
